_comment: MacroTilt data element registry per project Data Steward standards. Every element on the live site has source, ingestion mode, owner, cadence, freshness SLA, and registered consumers. v2 (2026-05-12) is the first pass that backfills the registry from 8 entries (v1) to all 75 feeds catalogued in DATA_LINEAGE_2026-05-12.md. Feeds with cadence='unknown — needs verification' are flagged in the _open_questions block below. v3 (2026-05-15) adds the MacroTilt 2-axis engine snapshot as a derived indicator element. Engine validated 1986-2026 (locked 2026-05-13). v4 (2026-05-20) registers the two Phase 1 data feeds for the rebuilt Trading Opportunities screener: scanner.darkpool-prints-uw and scanner.options-eod-uw. v6 (2026-05-21) records the Trading Opportunities dark-pool and options scoring engines going live (darkpool_scoring.py / options_scoring.py): both feeds move from “engine not yet built” to a live consumer; the screener score ceiling rises 5 -> 10. v5 (2026-05-21) records the Macro Overview data-quality correction pass: IG OAS re-pointed from the BAA-minus-DGS10 proxy to the canonical ICE BofA series (BAMLC0A0CM); IG OAS, the HY/IG ratio, and the commercial-paper spread moved off period-end resampling that was publishing future-dated stamps; the copper/gold ratio rescaled to the desk convention (x1000); and term-premium cadence corrected to daily. v7 (2026-05-22) registers news.market-headlines-multisource, the Home market-news headlines feed, after a SCAN_345PM idempotency-gate shell syntax error silently froze it at 2026-05-19. v8 (2026-05-22) moves that feed from the once-a-day scanner bake to an on-demand endpoint (api/macro-news.js), fetched on page load and CDN-cached ~10 min. v9 (2026-05-25) records the #1208 fix to the Trading Opportunities screener's prices_eod cold pull: the cross-run resume now paginates one ticker at a time (index-served range scans, no PostgREST or= disjunction that timed out) and mirrors the completed price panel to a durable Supabase Storage backstop (bucket screener-cache).
_freshness_sla_basis: Per LESSONS.md: daily=49h (covers T+1 publish + weekend), weekly=192h, monthly=1200h, quarterly=3600h. Real-time (Supabase reads with no producer) use null. Manual/one-shot use null.
_open_questions: portfolio.nav-chart — Vercel cron path /api/portfolio-history-snapshot referenced in code but not visible in vercel.json (only options-mark-batch is listed). Producer + schedule needs verification.
scanner.earnings-history-uw — workflow file name confirmed (EARNINGS_HISTORY_WEEKLY.yml) but ingest script path inside trading-scanner/ not confirmed from workflow YAML alone.
indicator.composite-share-badge and indicator.license-tier-badge — these are hand-curated metadata reads (dataRegistry.js + this file), not separate feeds. Listed under infra for completeness.

Sub-feed split between SCAN_345PM_WEEKDAYS.yml (current main) and V5_SCAN_DAILY.yml (lineage doc) — the lineage doc names V5_SCAN_DAILY but the worktree shows SCAN_345PM_WEEKDAYS. Both are listed; reconcile in next pass.

scanner.darkpool-prints-uw.notes: Service-only ingestion table (Pattern C) -- no front-end tile reads it directly; the Phase 2 screener engine reads it. Phase 1 of the Trading Opportunities overhaul. Rolling-window table: per-print UPSERT on tracking_id, prints older than 4 days pruned each run.

The launch decision is unaffected (insider + trend only). The Group 3 options-sentiment columns also lose their inputs.
scanner.options-eod-uw.notes: Service-only ingestion table (Pattern C). Phase 1 of the Trading Opportunities overhaul. One row per (ticker, as_of_date); per-contract detail stored as a 7-60 DTE superset jsonb so the Phase 2 backtest can move its candidate window without a re-ingest. Confirmed available on the current Unusual Whales API tier at no extra cost (Decision 2, 2026-05-20).

news.market-headlines-multisource.element: Macro market-news headlines (Home 'Market News / Macro' tile)
news.market-headlines-multisource.source_vendor: Multi-source RSS (ZeroHedge public RSS + CNBC / Bloomberg / Reuters / FT / WSJ via Google News RSS)
news.market-headlines-multisource.refresh_trigger: On-demand: api/macro-news.js serverless endpoint fetches the multi-source RSS on Home load
news.market-headlines-multisource.schedule_et: n/a - fetched on Home page load, CDN-cached ~10 min at the edge
consumer_surfaces: Home -> Market News / Macro tile (collapsed 7-item preview, expandable to all articles)
news.market-headlines-multisource.target_storage: None - fetched live by api/macro-news.js, CDN-cached ~10 min. The daily scan still bakes a copy into public/latest_scan_data.json -> signals.market_news, which the tile uses as a fallback if the endpoint is down.
news.market-headlines-multisource.failure_mode: If api/macro-news.js is unavailable the Home tile falls back to the last daily scan's market_news block; if that is also empty the tile shows 'No macro headlines available right now.'
news.market-headlines-multisource.notes: Distinct from news.ticker-events-news (the per-ticker UW modal feed). v8 (2026-05-22): moved off the once-a-day scanner bake to an on-demand endpoint (api/macro-news.js) so breaking news is never more than ~10 min stale and no scheduled job can silently freeze it - the 2026-05-19 freeze was exactly that failure mode. Free RSS only, zero Unusual Whales cost. Source list mirrors trading-scanner/scanner/market_news.py.

commentary.zerohedge-premium.notes: The weekly workflow is a cookie-health canary, not a content ingest. Content is fetched ad-hoc when a user opens a ZH source in the modal.

indicator.macrotilt-engine.element: MacroTilt 2-axis regime engine snapshot (stress state, yield regime, active sleeve, equity %)
indicator.macrotilt-engine.schedule_et: 15:45 ET weekdays (Friday close drives Monday-open execution)
consumer_surfaces: Macro Overview → two-axis header (stress state, MOVE percentile, yield regime, ΔY-3M percentile, active sleeve, equity %)
Asset Tilt → active defensive sleeve composition + equity %
Home page tile → Macro Overview tile (regime + equity %)
indicator.macrotilt-engine.failure_mode: Macro Overview header reads em-dash on stress + yield reads, Asset Tilt sleeve display blanks, freshness chip flips red after 49h.
indicator.macrotilt-engine.validation_window: 1986-2026 backtest (Sharpe 0.61, max drawdown 35.0% vs SPY 54.6%); locked 2026-05-13
upstream_inputs: FRED DGS10 (10-year Treasury constant maturity, pulled live)

consumer_surfaces: Trading Opportunities -> Today's Scan Results hero tile
screener.trading-opps-signals.failure_mode: Trading Opportunities table holds the last good dated snapshot; freshness chip goes amber then red.
screener.trading-opps-signals.notes: Phase 2 dual-direction screener. Runs the backtest-calibrated engine (insider + trend layers, with the 15-day-plateau insider age-decay) over the eligible universe and appends one dated snapshot per launched name. Append-only: earlier scan_dates are never overwritten. The screener's prices_eod cold pull paginates one ticker at a time (index-served range scans) and caches the completed price panel to GitHub Actions cache plus a durable Supabase Storage backstop (bucket screener-cache, object trading_opps/prices.pkl) so a cache eviction cannot reproduce a cold-pull outage; steady-state nightly runs do a seconds-long incremental refresh of the latest trade day (#1208).
